name: Fudge Truffle Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 14 oz Sweetened condensed milk (not evaporated milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a microwave-safe bowl, place chocolate chips and microwave at HIGH for 1-1/2 minutes, stirring. If necessary, microwave an additional 15 seconds at a time, stirring after each heating until the chips are melted when stirred.
3. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until fluffy.
4. Gradually beat in sweetened condensed milk until smooth.
5. Add melted chocolate chips, eggs, and vanilla; mix well.
6. Pour into prepared Chocolate Crumb Crust.
7. Bake for 1 hour and 5 minutes or until the center is set.
8. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack.
9. With a knife, loosen the cake from the side of the pan.
10. Cool completely and remove the side of the pan.
11. Refrigerate several hours before serving.
12. Garnish as desired. Cover; refrigerate leftover cheesecake.
Chocolate Crumb Crust:
1. In a medium bowl, stir together 1-1/2 cups vanilla wafers crumbs, 1/2 cup powdered sugar, 1/3 cup HERSHEY'S Cocoa, and 1/3 cup melted butter or margarine.
2. Press firmly onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
